scripts.build:wasm: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); if (spawnSync('wasm-pack', ['--version']).status === 0) { console.log('[R1] Building WASM with wasm-pack...'); spawnSync('wasm-pack', ['build', '--target', 'web', '--release', '--out-dir', '../public/wasm'], { cwd: './src-tauri', stdio: 'inherit' }); } else { console.warn('[R1] wasm-pack not found, skipping WASM build.'); }"
